    sigma_ion * ((T * k_B)) = ((D * n_c * z ^ 2 * e_c ^ 2)) := by subst h_sigma_ion; exact div_mul_cancel₀ _ hd0

    (C_V_mol + (K * T * V_m * alpha_V ^ 2)) = (C_V_mol + (K * N_A * T * V_cell * alpha_V ^ 2)) := by subst h_V_m; ring

    nu * (((2 * G) + (6 * K))) = (((-2 * G) + (3 * K))) := by subst h_nu; exact div_mul_cancel₀ _ hd0

contract_zt.lean:
theorem identity_contract_zt (PF : ℝ) (S : ℝ) (T : ℝ) (kappa : ℝ) (kappa_e : ℝ) (kappa_tot : ℝ) (sigma_el : ℝ) (h_PF : PF = (sigma_el * S ^ 2)) (h_kappa_tot : kappa_tot = (kappa + kappa_e)) (hd0 : (kappa + kappa_e) ≠ 0) :
    (PF * T) / (kappa_tot) = (T * sigma_el * S ^ 2) / ((kappa + kappa_e)) := by subst h_PF h_kappa_tot; field_simp

    kappa_c * (((k_f_3_3 * ((2 * k_m) + (G_int * a_rad))) + (-1 * f_vol * ((k_f_3_3 * ((-1 * k_m) + (G_int * a_rad))) + (-1 * G_int * a_rad * k_m))) + (2 * G_int * a_rad * k_m))) = ((k_m * ((k_f_3_3 * ((2 * k_m) + (G_int * a_rad))) + (2 * f_vol * ((k_f_3_3 * ((-1 * k_m) + (G_int * a_rad))) + (-1 * G_int * a_rad * k_m))) + (2 * G_int * a_rad * k_m)))) := by subst h_kappa_c; exact div_mul_cancel₀ _ hd0
